name: ben-montgomery-theme
description: Block theme workflow for the Ben Montgomery site.

scripts.lint: npm run lint:php && npm run lint:theme-json
scripts.lint:php: php -l functions.php && php -l inc/class-ben-montgomery-music-page.php && php -l inc/class-ben-montgomery-site-editor-sync-service.php && php -l inc/class-ben-montgomery-site-editor-sync-command.php && php -l scripts/seed-music-page.php && php -l tools/wordpress-mcp-adapter-loader/wordpress-mcp-adapter-loader.php && php -l tools/wordpress-mcp-adapter-loader/includes/class-ben-montgomery-mcp-abilities.php
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run verify:agentic
scripts.upload: npm run backup && npm run upload:ftp
